patterns.message: Upslope event Day 2: S/SE wind at 137°, humidity 70%, temp -6°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Close to warming concern: Freezing level rising to 1938m (threshold 2000m).
Cold snap Day 8: 12°C drop to -10°C. Great for powder preservation.
